meaning: n.分开,分割,区分,除法,公司,(军事)师,分配,分界线
examples: He joined the 40th Division as an army chaplain.
Ford was attached to the 101st Airborne Division.
First Airborne Division was heavily outgunned by German forces.
Now the space-sciences division watches for its work popping up in more popular contexts.
Lieutenant Colonel Greg Butts(ph), a battalion commander for the 101st Airborne Division, gives a driving tour.
